description: A square graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' template. The background is a desaturated black-and-white close-up photograph of handcuffed hands against a dark body. A red diagonal corner banner reads 'CHICAGO' in white serif caps. The top-left cyan bold sans-serif headline reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL'; a white sub-line reads '2/10/2025 | Chicago, IL.' A name is set large in white bold sans-serif over four lines: 'Jose Miguel Perez-Perez.' Below is the white 'CRIME:' label and a bulleted charge 'Child sexual assault.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark sit at bottom left; a red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box is at bottom right. The color scheme is red, white, and black with a cyan accent.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/10/2025 | Chicago, IL; Jose Miguel Perez-Perez; CRIME: Child sexual assault; CHICAGO; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
